creator: chris@calldei.com
text:
On Tue, Jun 1, 1999, Mikhail Teterin wrote:
> 	mi@chubby:~ (84) ls -l /dev/tun3
> 	crw-rw----  1 mi  dialer   52,   3 Jun  1 11:00 /dev/tun3
> 	mi@chubby:~ (85) groups
> 	mi dialer operator wheel
> 	mi@chubby:~ (86) cat /dev/tun3
> 	cat: /dev/tun3: Operation not permitted
> 	mi@chubby:~ (87) whoami
> 	mi

   No, it just means you can't use 'cat' on tunX.  Try running
'ppp' with it.

-- 
Chris Costello                                <chris@calldei.com>
A paperless office has about as much chance as a paperless bathroom.
